posts.text: BREAKING: Dell stock, $DELL, surges after President Trump says Michael Dell's donation to Trump Accounts will be "repaid" and urges people to buy the stock.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text: It’s difficult to avoid sharing my excitement about Aalo’s impressive accomplishment. At 12:20 AM (MT) on July 4, 2026, Aalo-CTR (Critical Test Reactor) achieved a self sustaining chain reaction – aka it went critical. The achievement was greeted with shouts, hugs, high fives and a general sense of mutual accomplishment. This video starts about a second later than I wanted, catching the words “is critical,” but missing the words “The reactor” Congratulations to the @AaloAtomics team. You worked diligently with care and inspiration. I spoke to a number of family members and heard about their pride in what you were doing. (Some were ready to spend some time with you after some long, busy months, so take time to rest, recover and restore relationships.) We won’t talk about the delay between the event and the announcement.
posts.author: quakes99
